prior.claim_text: [effective_date] Omnibus I entered into force 18 March 2026, with national transposition required by 19 March 2027
prior.source_span: After the publication in the Official Journal on 26 February 2026 of Directive 2026/470 , Member States have 12 months to transpose the new provisions into national law.

prior.claim_text: [jurisdictional_scope] Following Omnibus I, mandatory CSRD reporting applies to EU undertakings with more than 1,000 employees and net annual turnover exceeding €450 million
prior.source_span: European companies and non-EU issuers employing on average over 1,000 employees and with a net annual turnover of over €450 million will remain within the scope of the CSRD.
